race.name: Attraverso Campra
race.tagline: The Italian-speaking Swiss entry in the Swiss Loppet — a compact freestyle marathon through Ticino's Campra valley.

climate.description: Campra valley at 1,200m altitude provides decent snow conditions for Ticino. Temperatures typically -3°C to 5°C in March.
challenges: Southern exposure can melt snow quickly

course.primary: Compact loop course through the Campra valley in Ticino, Switzerland's Italian-speaking canton.
features: Only Swiss Loppet race in Italian-speaking Switzerland
Compact course suitable for all abilities

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Unique as the only Italian-speaking Swiss Loppet race, but small and compact.

history.summary: Attraverso Campra is part of the Swiss Loppet series, uniquely representing Switzerland's Italian-speaking Ticino canton. The Campra valley is Ticino's premier Nordic skiing venue.
notable_facts: The only Swiss Loppet race in Italian-speaking Switzerland
Campra is Ticino's main Nordic skiing center
Part of the Swiss Loppet series
